class.name: JWT
class.brief_description: Singleton for JSON Web Token (JWT) encoding, decoding, validation, and cryptographic operations.

method.name: base64url_decode
method.description: Decodes a Base64Url-encoded string into a standard String.

method.name: base64url_encode
method.description: Encodes a String into a Base64Url-encoded string.

method.name: clear_revoked
method.description: Clears all revoked JTIs from the internal blacklist cache.

method.name: create_jwt
method.description: Creates a JWT from a header and payload dictionary. The key type depends on the algorithm.

method.name: create_jwt_hs256
method.description: Creates a JWT signed with HMAC SHA-256 (HS256) using a given secret string.

method.name: create_jwt_rs256
method.description: Creates a JWT signed with RSA (RS256) using a CryptoKey.

method.name: create_jwt_timed
method.description: Deprecated. Prefer using [JWTBuilder] with [method JWTBuilder.set_expiration] instead.

method.name: decode
method.description: Decodes the JWT payload into a dictionary without validating the signature. Do not use for authentication.

method.name: get_algorithm
method.description: Extracts the algorithm (`alg`) from the unverified JWT header.

method.name: get_claim
method.description: Extracts a specific claim from the unverified JWT payload.

method.name: get_header
method.description: Decodes and returns the JWT header as a dictionary without validating the signature.

method.name: get_kid
method.description: Extracts the Key ID (`kid`) from the unverified JWT header.

method.name: get_payload
method.description: Decodes and returns the JWT payload as a dictionary without validating the signature.

method.name: get_signature
method.description: Extracts the signature portion of the JWT.

method.name: has_claim
method.description: Returns `true` if the unverified JWT payload contains the specified claim.

method.name: is_expired
method.description: Checks whether the JWT is expired based on its `exp` claim. Does not validate the signature.

method.name: is_revoked
method.description: Checks whether the specified JTI has been explicitly revoked in the internal blacklist.

method.name: parse
method.description: Parses an encoded JWT string and returns a [DecodedJWT] object for easier inspection. Does not validate the signature.

method.name: revoke_jti
method.description: Adds a JTI claim to the internal blacklist. Any future validation of tokens containing this JTI will fail.

method.name: validate
method.description: Validates the JWT's signature against the provided key. The key must be a [String] for HS256 or a [CryptoKey] for RS256.

method.name: validate_any
method.description: Validates the JWT's signature against an array of keys. It returns `true` if any key correctly validates the token.

method.name: validate_claims
method.description: Validates that the JWT payload contains the exact claims specified in the `expected_claims` dictionary.

method.name: validate_claims_diagnostic
method.description: Validates claims against the `expected_claims` dictionary and returns an array of keys that failed validation.

method.name: validate_diagnostic
method.description: Evaluates the JWT signature and structural validity, returning a dictionary detailing `valid`, `error`, and internal constraints.

method.name: validate_header_claims
method.description: Validates that the JWT header contains the exact claims specified in the `expected_claims` dictionary.

method.name: validate_signature_hs256
method.description: Validates an HS256 JWT signature using the explicit string secret.

method.name: validate_signature_rs256
method.description: Validates an RS256 JWT signature using the provided [CryptoKey].

method.name: validate_timing
method.description: Validates the `exp` (expiration) and `nbf` (not before) claims against the current time, with an optional clock leeway in seconds.

method.name: validate_with_map
method.description: Validates the JWT using a map of keys. It automatically selects the correct key from the `key_map` dictionary based on the token's `kid` header.
